text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I'm stuffed. I'd better get ready for
tomorrow and get to sleep soon...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? The electricity's out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, everyone! Stay calm and remain
where you are!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Someone save me! I'm so scared!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know that voice... Mayano?! Are you in the
kitchen? Hang on, I'm coming for you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have to close my eyes, focus... and visualize the
dorm's layout!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There! I have a good picture of the space now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There are three tables along the wall, and it's
about ten paces to the counter from where I am...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Accidentally kicked the table leg... I'd
better watch where I'm stepping!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay! This open space must be the counter! Now,
all I have to do is follow along the wall to the
right...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic... Fuji? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I took so long, Mayano! Everything's okay
now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...The lights are back on. See, there's nothing to
be afraid of.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aaah, Fuji! ♪ Thanks for coming to save me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I couldn't possibly have left a crying
princess all on her own.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I'm a princess?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course. You're an incredibly adorable and
diligent princess, at that.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, Fuji! You're just like a real-life prince!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Weeeee!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, now, it's dangerous to run in here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that concentrated focus I used earlier feels
like it would come in handy when running!

The next day, Fuji Kiseki runs more swiftly than
ever in training!
